project.name: Hono
project.tagline: Small, simple, ultrafast — on every runtime.
project.problem: Most web frameworks lock you to a single runtime.

main.headline: Your framework shouldn't pick your runtime.
main.caption: Rewrites every time you change platforms.

main.code:
import { Hono } from 'hono'

const app = new Hono()

app.get('/', (c) => c.text('Hello Hono!'))

export default app
main.caption: Built on Web Standards — familiar and tiny.

commands.output:
✔ Target directory  ./my-app
✔ Which template?   cloudflare-workers

Ready. cd my-app && npm run dev
